artifacts.type: training_doc | verified_automation_report | screenshot | run_report | how_to_guide | findings_report

demoerExperience.whatWorkedWell: What looked good during the demo from the demoer's perspective
demoerExperience.whatWasConfusingOrBroken: What was confusing, broken, or unexpected in the UI
demoerExperience.performanceIssues: Any slow rendering, streaming gaps, or latency issues observed

demoerExperience.suggestionsForImprovement: Actionable suggestions to improve the demo experience

react185Status.evidence: No React error #185 found in any screenshot or video frame

rawData.agentTranscript: Path to full agent transcript if captured
rawData.browserConsoleLog: Path to browser console log if captured
